pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime targeting.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI, which is compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
Add explicit javax.validation dependency to resolve API changes in Jakarta EE migration within Spring Boot 3.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing support.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for HTTP service stubbing and mocking.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix test execution issues.
Configure Maven JAR plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Configure JaCoCo plugin with specific exclusions and coverage rules.
Add a new Maven profile for running with WireMock enabled.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing with frontend build steps.
Rename the artifact ID from 'kitchensink' to 'team03' to reflect the project identity.
Update the group ID to match the new project structure.
Add various Maven properties for main class, package paths, and target classes.
Add spring-dotenv dependency for loading environment variables from .env files.
Add Lombok dependency for reducing boilerplate code.
Add Spring Boot DevTools for faster development cycles.
Add PostgreSQL driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor for metadata generation.
Add Spring Boot Starter Test and Spring Security Test dependencies.
Add H2 database dependency for in-memory testing and development.
Add Frontend Maven Plugin to build the React frontend during the Maven build process.
Add Maven Antrun Plugin to copy frontend build artifacts to the backend output directory.
Configure Spring Boot Maven Plugin with the main class.
Add standard Spring Boot starter dependencies for JPA, OAuth2, Security, and Web.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven JDK 11 to Liberica OpenJDK 21 Alpine to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven via apk since the base image no longer provides it.
Install bash via apk to support shell scripts in the build process.
Install libstdc++ via apk to satisfy native library dependencies.
Switch from NodeSource apt script to nvm for installing Node.js on Alpine.
Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed or compatible.
Add Maven build step to compile the application inside the Docker image.
Define the Java JAR execution as the container entrypoint.
Add instructions to copy source code and configuration files into the image.
